Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO CONSUMER PROTECTION
COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Relates to a prohibition on chatbot toys
Summary: Prohibits the manufacture, exchange, distribution and sale of chatbot toys in this state.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, in relation to prohibiting the manufacture and sale of chatbot toys; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon the expiration thereof
